calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joshua N. Sondheimer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff David Maxwell-Jolly, Director of the Department of Health Care Services.
No appearance by defendant Rose Singleton, as Personal Representative of the Estate of Lloyd Sparrow, Decedent.
Default was entered against defendant on January 6, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 8, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 1, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff David Maxwell-Jolly, Director of the Department of Health Care Services, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rose Singleton, as Personal Representative of the Estate of Lloyd Sparrow, Decedent as follows:

Damages/Principal - $593,033.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $152,628.96.
Costs - $370.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $740,032.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Continued To Mar-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2009 Off Calendar
